title: Cardamine thermarum

The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Cardamine thermarum include isothiocyanates, alkaloids, and saponins, which have been reported to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties.
